channel.title: Client Onboarding on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Client Onboarding on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Onboard Clients Faster as a Solopreneur Without Losing Your Mind
item.description: You’re a solopreneur or freelancer, and every new client feels like a win—until the onboarding process drags on. You’re stuck sending endless emails, chasing down info, explaining the same things over and over, and somehow still missing deadlines. It’s exhausting, and worse, it makes you look unprofessional. If you’ve ever wondered how to onboard clients faster without sacrificing quality, this post is for you. I’m going to walk you through a practical system to streamline your onboarding, plus a few tools to make it even easier.
